## Summary
- [ ] Describe the change clearly
- [ ] Link related issue/task

## Validation
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `docker compose build` succeeds
- [ ] `docker compose up -d` starts healthy services
- [ ] Logs reviewed (`docker compose logs --tail=100 app db`)

## Review
- [ ] At least 1 peer comment captured
- [ ] No direct commit to `main`
